title: matrella juncea
intro: Matrella juncea, also known as Chinese cinnamon or Chinese evergreen, is a type of evergreen shrub native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matrella juncea include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried root or bark.
